events.title: EP Plenary Session Voting Session

items.title: EP Plenary Session Voting Session
items.summary: Voting Session (A10-0183/2026) NAVARRETE ROJAS - Provision of digital euro services by payment services providers incorporated in Member States whose currency is not the euro and amending Regulation (EU) (A10-0185/2026) NAVARRETE ROJAS - Establishment of the digital euro (A10-0192/2026) CHAHIM - Amendments to the Critical Raw Materials Act (C10-0178/2026) - Amending Regulation (EU) 2021/1232 as regards the extension of its period of application The threat of war crimes, the escalating violations of international humanitarian law and the human rights situation in El-Obeid, Sudan Ongoing persecution of Christians in Nigeria, notably the Kawel village massacre The abduction, forced conversion and child marriage of Maria Shahbaz and the protection of girls in Pakistan (A10-0167/2026) ÓDOR - Feasibility of a 28th tax regime and its potential to support EU competitiveness Joint communication on humanitarian aid

items.title: EC archives of the week (28/06-04/07): Luxembourg European Council (28-29/06/1991, 35 years ago) Danube Day (29/06) Birth Robert Schuman (29/06/1886, 140 years ago) Luxembourg European Council (29-30/06/1981, 45 years ago) Presentation of Sweden's request for membership of the EC (01/07/1991, 35 years ago) Ireland holds the rotating presidency of the Council of the EU (01/07) Application of the EU-South Korea Free Trade Agreement (01/07/2011, 15 years ago) Enlargement to Croatia (01/07/2013, 13 years ago) Awarding of the Robert Schuman medal to Konrad Adenauer, former German Federal Chancellor (02/07/1966, 60 years ago) End of single use plastics (03/07/2021, 5 years ago) End of single use plastics (03/07)
